Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-35387 affecting package openssh for versions less than 9.8p1-8
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-35387 affecting package openssh for versions less than 9.8p1-8. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package openssh is earlier than 9.8p1-8, affected by CVE-2026-35387
